hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then make fmt 2>/dev/null; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'web/frontend/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css)$'; then cd web/frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then PKG=$(dirname "$FILE"); cd /home/openclaw/picoclaw && go vet ./$(realpath --relative-to=. "$PKG")/... 2>&1 | head -20; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|key|pem|secret)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to edit sensitive file' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(go\.sum|pnpm-lock\.yaml)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly. Use go mod tidy or pnpm install.' >&2; exit 2; fi
